title: nasturtium microstylum
intro: Nasturtium microstylum, also known as Indian cress or water cress, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family that is commonly found in wetlands and waterways. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as skin irritations and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Nasturtium microstylum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce blood pressure, and act as a natural antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Nasturtium microstylum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin conditions.
